arts.ttl: Tomori warning to Milan he will not accept Tottenham
arts.sum: La Gazzetta dello Sport claim Fikayo Tomori has definitively told Milan he does not want...

arts.ttl: 'They're cowards' - Ange Postecoglou blasts online trolls for vitriol and abuse
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou has been subjected to a wave of online abuse and criticism during Tottenham's recent poor run of form.

arts.ttl: Tottenham get £50m Dibling transfer green light as Southampton decision made
arts.sum: Injury problems could make Spurs less keen on signing the duo in the winter window especially with the former Manchester United star plagued by problems this season. With the 18-year-old fit enough to feature, Tottenham look to have been given the green light to try and sign him this month after being rejected by Tel.

arts.ttl: Slot: TAA doubtful for Spurs SF clash with injury
arts.sum: Arne Slot has said he "would be surprised" if Trent Alexander-Arnold is able to play in Liverpool's Carabao Cup semifinal second leg clash against Tottenham.

arts.ttl: Report: Tottenham could now do a part-exchange deal involving ‘brilliant’ striker
arts.sum: We’re getting towards the bitter end of the transfer window, and Spurs are yet to make anything substantial happen. Spurs have signed Antonin Kinsky, but...

arts.ttl: Trent a doubt for Spurs semi-final after injury at Bournemouth
arts.sum: Arne Slot says he would be "surprised" if Trent Alexander-Arnold featured in Liverpool's Carabao Cup semi-final second leg against Tottenham, live on Sky Sports, after the defender limped off injured against Bournemouth on Saturday.

arts.ttl: ‘My understanding’: Tottenham won’t be signing £22m striker after Mathys Tel blow – journalist
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur are having a really tough time of it in this January transfer window. Indeed, Spurs have pursued a lot of different transfer options...

arts.ttl: "For the right price!" Tottenham 'open' to attacker sale before deadline despite injury crisis
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur are reportedly open to the idea of letting Richarlison leave this month, despite their injury crisis and the Brazilian's recent return to form.

arts.ttl: Everton 4-0 Leicester City: Highlights, man of the match, stats as David Moyes, Beto move Toffees above Tottenham Hotspur
arts.sum: David Moyes's Everton roar to a third consecutive Premier League victory with a dominant display against Leicester City on Saturday afternoon.

arts.ttl: Fikayo Tomori shows true colours as ex-Chelsea defender makes huge Tottenham transfer 'decision'
arts.sum: The report states that Postecoglou wants to sign a defender before Monday evening's deadline, and Tomori was one of a few options on the Lilywhites' shortlist . The AC Milan defender has been linked with a move to the Lilywhites this month, as Ange Postecoglou looks to bolster his backline before the January transfer window slams shut on Monday night.
